ForeignOwnership: Leasehold for individuals. Freehold only via legal entity / structure to verify.
SalesAngle: Best for investors who want higher rental yield and lifestyle demand, but accept weaker construction reliability and legal nuance.
MainRisk: Legal structure, leasehold terms, developer reliability

InvestorBonus: Investor visa 2 years. Golden Visa from about $550k for 5/10 years.
SalesAngle: Best for clients who want transparent ownership, strong liquidity and easier financing, but accept lower yield and higher entry price.
MainRisk: Higher price per m² and lower yield

SaleTax: Leasehold 1.1% on purchase. Freehold 6.3%. Profit tax 0–35%
ForeignOwnership: Leasehold 30 years. Freehold quota up to 49% of project units.
InvestorBonus: Visa 3+12 months with in-country extension from about $100k / 3M THB.
SalesAngle: Best for clients who want a familiar resort market with clearer condo mechanics than Bali, but yield is usually lower.
MainRisk: Foreign quota, tax range, lower rental yield

SaleTax: Up to 2 years ownership: 5% / sometimes up to 20%. More than 2 years: no tax.
SalesAngle: Best for clients with small budget who want ownership simplicity, but rental demand and global liquidity are weaker than Bali/Dubai.
